name: Chicken and Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the chicken, cheese, spinach, and onion.
2. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
3. Stir together the eggs, milk, mayonnaise, and pepper in a separate bowl until smooth.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the chicken mixture.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 - 50 minutes.
